title: FreezeHibernate
description: Freezes/Hibernates the server when no players are online
body:
## As of 1.21.2, this plugin is no longer needed. Simply configure `pause-when-empty-seconds` in your server.properties file instead. 

This plugin stops the server tick when the last player disconnects, and starts ticking again automatically when a player joins the server.
This can save server resources in some cases, especially if you have a lot of spawn chunks or force-loaded chunks.

As opposed to other solutions, plugins like Dynmap will continue working and no "Can't keep up" messages will be shown. FreezeHibernate also does _not_ require multiple connection attempts to unfreeze the server.

**This uses the new tick debugging feature introduced in 1.20.3/1.20.4, and as such will not work on versions older than 1.20.4.**

There are no commands or configuration files. If you wish to unfreeze or freeze the server manually, you can use the [vanilla command](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Commands/tick).
